/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/StudentManagementSystem.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/StudentManagementSystem.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/StudentManagementSystem.dir/src/data_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/StudentManagementSystem.dir/src/ui.c.o -o StudentManagementSystem  -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lcairo -lharfbuzz -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lz
